privileged_info_summary: The task uses real VitalRecorder data from three intraoperative cases stored in binary .vital format. Case 0003 is the target case containing dynamic respiratory mechanics monitoring tracks (COMPLIANCE, MAWP_MBAR, PPLAT_MBAR). However, there is a critical contradiction in the task metadata: the README and README claim that 'Cases 0001 and 0002 do NOT have lung compliance — only 0003 does,' but binary analysis reveals that ALL THREE CASES (0001, 0002, 0003) actually contain the COMPLIANCE track. Additionally, case 0001 contains both ART data AND COMPLIANCE, and case 0002 contains both FLOW parameters AND COMPLIANCE, contradicting the metadata's implied distinctions. The task references legitimate lung-protective ventilation (LPV) clinical parameters: low tidal volumes, PEEP management, plateau pressure monitoring (target <30 cmH2O), and dynamic compliance assessment—all of which are documented clinical standards. The case data includes surgery event markers ('Surgery started', 'Surgery finished') used to segment intraoperative periods. File sizes: case 0001 (~77 MB uncompressed), case 0002 (~87 MB), case 0003 (~25 MB).
